description: Comprehensive operational dashboard for the Nexus distributed AI inference engine. Covers cluster health, inference performance, GPU utilization, Raft consensus, and resilience subsystems.

panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting as alive in the cluster.
panels.title: Active Nodes

panels.description: Total number of Raft leader elections since cluster start. Frequent elections may indicate instability.
panels.title: Leader Elections

panels.description: Composite system pressure score (0 = idle, 1 = fully saturated). Drives adaptive load shedding.
panels.title: System Pressure

panels.description: Inbound request throughput across the entire Nexus cluster.
panels.title: Requests/sec

panels.description: End-to-end request latency at P50, P95, and P99 quantiles.
panels.title: Request Latency P50 / P95 / P99

panels.description: Distribution of dynamic batch sizes used by the inference engine.
panels.title: Batch Size Distribution

panels.description: Time requests spend waiting for a batch to fill before dispatching to a GPU.
panels.title: Batch Wait Time

panels.description: Number of requests currently enqueued and waiting for inference.
panels.title: Queue Depth

panels.description: GPU compute utilization percentage broken down by cluster node.
panels.title: GPU Utilization per Node

panels.description: GPU memory usage as a fraction of total available memory, stacked by node.
panels.title: GPU Memory Usage

panels.description: Accuracy drift score per model. Values approaching 1.0 indicate significant degradation from baseline.
panels.title: Model Accuracy Drift

panels.description: Total number of automated model rollbacks triggered by accuracy drift or health failures.
panels.title: Model Rollbacks

panels.description: Raft commit index per node. Divergent lines indicate replication lag or a split-brain scenario.
panels.title: Commit Index

panels.description: Number of log entries a follower is behind the leader. High values signal network or performance issues.
panels.title: Replication Lag

panels.description: Latency of Write-Ahead Log (WAL) fsyncs. Spikes indicate disk I/O bottlenecks.
panels.title: WAL Write Latency

panels.description: Inter-node RPC latency broken down by RPC type (AppendEntries, RequestVote, InstallSnapshot).
panels.title: RPC Latency

panels.description: Currently active load shedding levels. Level 0 = nominal, higher levels = progressively shedding lower-priority traffic.
panels.title: Load Shed Level

panels.description: Rate of requests being shed (rejected) by the load shedder, broken down by request priority.
panels.title: Requests Shed

panels.description: Per-node circuit breaker state: 0 = closed (healthy), 1 = half-open (probing), 2 = open (tripped).
panels.title: Circuit Breaker States

panels.description: Token generation throughput for streaming inference responses.
panels.title: Stream Tokens/sec

title: Nexus - Distributed AI Inference Engine
